test_cases.name: create_valid_author
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with valid data returns 201 and the author details

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author without a name returns 422 validation error

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving an existing author returns 200 and the author details

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving a non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_match
test_cases.description: Verify conditional GET with matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify updating an author with valid data returns 200 and updated details

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verify updating an author with mismatched ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verify deleting an author with no associated books returns 204

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verify deleting an author with associated books returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_valid_category
test_cases.description: Verify creating a category with valid data returns 201 and the category details

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category_name
test_cases.description: Verify creating a category with a duplicate name returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_valid_book
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with valid data returns 201 and the book details

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_author_id
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with a non-existent author_id returns 404

test_cases.name: list_books_with_pagination
test_cases.description: Verify listing books with pagination returns 200 and paginated results

test_cases.name: filter_books_by_author
test_cases.description: Verify filtering books by author_id returns 200 and filtered results

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving an existing book returns 200 and the book details

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify updating a book with valid data returns 200 and updated details

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify updating a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: soft_delete_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify soft-deleting an existing book returns 204

test_cases.name: delete_already_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify deleting an already soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify restoring a soft-deleted book returns 200 and the book details

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify restoring a non-deleted book returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: create_valid_review
test_cases.description: Verify creating a review for a book returns 201 and the review details

test_cases.name: create_review_for_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify creating a review for a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: apply_valid_discount
test_cases.description: Verify applying a valid discount to a book returns 200 and discounted price

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verify applying a discount to a book published less than 1 year ago returns 400

test_cases.name: exceed_discount_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verify exceeding the discount rate limit returns 429 Too Many Requests

test_cases.name: update_stock_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verify updating stock with a valid quantity returns 200 and updated book details
